entity_types.name: PERSON
entity_types.description: Individual human names, aliases, and role-specific personal references.

entity_types.name: ORG
entity_types.description: Organizations such as companies, institutions, teams, and government bodies.

entity_types.name: LOC
entity_types.description: Geographic locations including cities, countries, regions, and landmarks.

entity_types.name: DATE
entity_types.description: Temporal expressions including dates, years, and date ranges.

entity_types.name: PRODUCT
entity_types.description: Named products, devices, platforms, or branded offerings.
